questions.text: Which of these is a physical change?
questions.explanation: Melting ice is a physical change because no new substance is formed. The change is reversible.

questions.text: Rusting of iron is a chemical change.
questions.explanation: Rusting is a chemical change where iron reacts with oxygen and moisture to form iron oxide (rust).

questions.correctAnswer: The process of obtaining pure substance in the form of crystals from its solution.
questions.explanation: Crystallization is a physical change used to obtain pure crystals from impure solutions.

questions.text: The process of coating iron with zinc to prevent rusting is called ________.
questions.explanation: Galvanization is the process of depositing a layer of zinc on iron to prevent rusting.
